notes: No regular open issues in the repo. Workflow files (.github/workflows/) are protected. Past changes applied by maintainer directly to master up to aba0042. Five open PRs: #21 (microdrive new0), #22 (snap AY/beta/ZXATASP tests 100-102), #23 (snap DivIDE/SpecDrum/Fuller/Multiface tests 100-103), #24 (tape_block new0), aw_pr25 (ide_alloc new0). Note: PRs #22 and #23 both number tests starting at 100 - maintainer must renumber when merging. Build: ./autogen.sh && ./configure --with-fake-glib && make. Tests: make check. Next runs: consider tests for tape_accessors (libspectrum_tape_block accessors), zxatasp_port_a/b/c, divide_pages, multiface_ram pointer accessors, Spectranet accessors, ULAplus, DISCiPLE.
